evidence_summary: [CH001_SC004] Purpose: Transition from action to a state of suspended, eerie calm; establishes the new status quo.
[CH001_SC004] Summary: The violent shaking subsides into a rhythmic swaying. Exhausted and overwhelmed, Dorothy and Toto fall asleep as the house continues its long, silent journey through the sky.
[CH001_SC004] Coverage: Slow, sweeping pans. Soft, rhythmic lighting (simulating passing clouds). Close-ups on Dorothy and Toto sleeping.
[CH001_SC004] Continuity: The "sway" rhythm; light patterns moving across the floor as the house drifts through different cloud layers.
